things.description: Village of 500 pottery workshops producing Djerban amphora since Phoenician times

things.description: Traditional market with antiques, silver jewellery and Berber textiles

things.description: Long white sand beaches on the Atlantic coast of the island

things.name: Crocodile Farm
things.description: Unusual farm with hundreds of Nile crocodiles

things.description: Extraordinary contemporary digital museum telling 3,000 years of Djerba history

things.name: Djerba Explore Heritage Village
things.description: Reconstructed Djerban village with a traditional crafts museum

things.name: Ajim Ferry & Fishing Village
things.description: Traditional fishing village with an octopus-drying tradition

things.name: Ojja (Spiced Egg Ragout)
things.description: Djerban specialty - scrambled eggs with merguez sausage, peppers and harissa
